query: WITH latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (slug) id, slug::text AS slug, version, name, description, status, sourcing_mode, manifest, created_at FROM plugins WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND status = $2 AND ($3::text IS NULL OR sourcing_mode = $3) ORDER BY slug, created_at DESC ) SELECT id, slug, version, name, description, status, sourcing_mode, manifest, created_at FROM latest WHERE ($4::text[] = '{}' OR ( CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof(manifest->'tags') = 'array' THEN ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(manifest->'tags')) ELSE ARRAY[]::text[] END ) @> $4) AND ($5::timestamptz IS NULL OR (created_at, id) < ($5, $6)) ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT $7
